case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION vs. CLARK, OTTO et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, OTTO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-20-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-22-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-03-1994

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-22-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-22-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-24-1994 CONTINUED FROM FEB-22-1994 TO MAR-24-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-25-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-25-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR MAY-25-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-20-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-20-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-24-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-24-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TOTAL SANCTIONS $150.00., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-25-1994 CONTINUED FROM MAR-24-1994 TO APR-25-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
